title: Active momentum mutual funds outperform Nifty, passive peers
description: Actively managed momentum funds have outperformed the Nifty and passive funds over the past year. Their algorithm-driven stock selection and shorter holding periods navigated a volatile market. Bigger bets on outperforming mid and small-cap stocks also contributed to these significant gains. This market-beating potential has prompted new active momentum fund launches recently. These funds use quantitative models to shuffle portfolios based on strengthening price trends.

title: FM Sitharaman to Meet PSB Chiefs to Review Foreign Currency Deposit Drive
description: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman will meet the heads of public sector banks on July 13 to review the progress of the foreign currency deposit mobilisation campaign aimed at attracting overseas funds. The review comes after the Reserve Bank of India relaxed interest rate norms for FCNR(B) deposits and introduced concessional forex swap facilities to encourage banks and public sector enterprises to raise foreign currency resources. The meeting is also expected to focus on external commercial borrowings and credit growth, with the government likely to encourage banks to increase lending to productive sectors of the economy.
content:

title: Active momentum mutual funds outperform Nifty, passive peers
description: Actively managed momentum funds have outperformed the Nifty and passive funds over the past year. Their algorithm-driven stock selection and shorter holding periods navigated a volatile market. Bigger bets on outperforming mid and small-cap stocks also contributed to these significant gains. This market-beating potential has prompted new active momentum fund launches recently. These funds use quantitative models to shuffle portfolios based on strengthening price trends.

description: According to the expert, investors should add a new mutual fund only if it reduces portfolio concentration, adds meaningful diversification, and fits your financial goals. A compact portfolio of 5 to 6 funds can often provide better diversification.

title: Anand Rathi Wealth Q1FY27 PAT rises 57.6% to ₹16,300.77 lakh
description: Anand Rathi Wealth reported a 57.6% YoY increase in consolidated net profit to ₹16,300.77 lakh for Q1 FY27, with revenue growing 11.8% to ₹32,198.50 lakh. The company's AUM reached ₹1,06,300 crore, up 21.1% YoY, and it remains on track to meet its FY27 targets. The Board proposed a SEBI application to sponsor a Mutual Fund, and unaudited results were reviewed by statutory auditors.
